nasb.text: Though his hatred covers itself with guile, His wickedness will be revealed before the assembly.

esv.text: though his hatred be covered with deception, his wickedness will be exposed in the assembly.

cnv.text: 他的怨恨雖然以詭詐掩飾， 但他的邪惡必在大會中顯露出來。

ccb.text: 虽然他用诡计掩饰怨恨， 他的邪恶必被会众揭穿。

csbs.text: 他的怨恨虽用欺瞒掩盖， 但他的邪恶必在会众里被揭露。
